author: RamSet
releaseNotes: Fully-local irrigation controller for Zooz ZEN16/ZEN17 relays (or any Switch device): day-of-week or every-N-days scheduling, cycle & soak, Open-Meteo weather (rain delay, seasonal scaling, smart skips; unit-aware), rain/moisture/pause sensors with true pause-and-resume, pump/master valve, HomeKit/dashboard exposure, notifications, and a verified hardware auto-off failsafe. Includes a RamSet fork of @jtp10181's ZEN16/ZEN17 Advanced drivers (adds ping(), removes telemetry).
tags: Irrigation, Sprinkler, Zooz, ZEN16, ZEN17, Z-Wave, Weather, Local

apps.name: Zooz Sprinkler Scheduler
apps.description: Sprinkler/irrigation scheduler app — zones, weather, sensors, pause-and-resume, and hardware safety.

drivers.name: Zooz ZEN16 MultiRelay Advanced
drivers.description: Zooz ZEN16 (3-relay) driver — RamSet fork of @jtp10181's, exposes setParameter for the hardware auto-off push and adds ping(). Optional: only needed if you drive the zones with a ZEN16.

drivers.name: Zooz ZEN17 Universal Relay Advanced
drivers.description: Zooz ZEN17 (2-relay) driver — RamSet fork of @jtp10181's. Optional: only needed if you drive the zones with a ZEN17.
